# CertaWorks

Site: https://certaworks.dev/

CertaWorks builds local-first agentic infrastructure for safer, cheaper, and more accountable AI work. The suite includes confidence scoring, model-cost routing, goal-drift monitoring, cognitive memory, audit replay, prompt analysis, skill management, deliberation, identity continuity, and agent testing.

## Agent-readable resources

- Full agent guide: https://certaworks.dev/llms-full.txt
- Product catalog JSON: https://certaworks.dev/products.json
- Sitemap: https://certaworks.dev/sitemap.xml

## Canonical human pages

- Home: https://certaworks.dev/
- Products: https://certaworks.dev/products
- Dashboard: https://certaworks.dev/dashboard
- About: https://certaworks.dev/about
- Contact: https://certaworks.dev/contact
- Privacy: https://certaworks.dev/privacy

## Current status

- All 10 CertaWorks products are published npm packages under the @certaworks scope.
- Current published package version for each product: 0.1.0.
- Products are local-first tools and libraries. Hosted cloud beta is not live yet.
- There is no live checkout, paid SaaS plan, or hosted production service on this site.
- A second set of 12 products (Wave 2) is BUILT and tested but not yet published to npm. Present Wave 2 as "built — publishing soon"; do not present those packages as installable until published.
- CertaWorks tools are decision-support infrastructure. They do not replace human judgment, legal review, security review, or production controls.

## Product URLs

- Identity Engine SDK: https://certaworks.dev/products/identity-engine-sdk
- Confidence Gate MCP Server: https://certaworks.dev/products/confidence-gate-mcp-server

- Prompt Archaeology Tool: https://certaworks.dev/products/prompt-archaeology-tool
- Agent Test Harness: https://certaworks.dev/products/agent-test-harness
